rusty_dagger.name: Rusty Dagger
rusty_dagger.description: A dull blade with spots of rust. Better than nothing.

hammer.name: Hammer
hammer.description: A heavy hammer. Slow but powerful.

spear.name: Spear
spear.description: A long spear with a sharp point.

hrunting.name: Hrunting
hrunting.description: An ancient blade that hums with power.

mjolnir.name: Mjolnir
mjolnir.description: The thunder god's hammer. It crackles with energy.

gungnir.name: Gungnir
gungnir.description: Odin's spear. It never misses its mark.

tyrfing.name: Tyrfing
tyrfing.description: A cursed sword that must draw blood when unsheathed.

dainsleif.name: Dainsleif
dainsleif.description: A cursed blade that thirsts for blood.

excalibur.name: Excalibur
excalibur.description: The legendary sword. It glows with a soft light.

masamune.name: Masamune
masamune.description: A perfectly balanced katana. Cuts through anything.

keyblade.name: Keyblade
keyblade.description: A blade shaped like a key. Opens hearts.

anduril.name: Anduril
anduril.description: Flame of the West. Burns with white fire.

badger_on_stick.name: Badger on a Stick
badger_on_stick.description: It's... a badger. On a stick. Surprisingly effective.

ragnarok.name: Ragnarok
ragnarok.description: The end of all things. A weapon of terrible power.

falcon_punch.name: FALCON PUNCH
falcon_punch.description: SHOW ME YOUR MOVES! The ultimate weapon.
